bpWarnings.note: table create writer never emits DeveloperDocumentation; prepare(create) property-defaults section does not list it as required either
case creates no form; unavoidable for this case
class declaration written verbatim from sourceCode; no doc-header scaffolding
add-method does NOT scaffold an XML doc header, while add-table-method / add-display-method DO - inconsistent writers

root_cause_hypothesis: Build + golden pass; bp_clean fails and two modify writers misbehave. (1) add-table-method resolves the key field's EDT only from the SQLite symbol index, so for a table created moments earlier via the bridge (not yet indexed) it silently falls back to the FIELD NAME as the parameter type -> 'public static ConDemoCalcData find(ItemName _itemName ...)', which is uncompilable X++; it becomes correct (Name) only after an explicit update_symbol_index. (2) add-display-method's tool description promises [SysClientCacheDataMethodAttribute] but the generated stub has no attribute. (3) bridge replaceCode rejected a multi-line oldCode block ('oldCode not found') that literally exists in the file - almost certainly newline/indent normalization - and only the direct-XML fallback saved the operation. (4) bp_clean=0 is driven by writer defaults: table create emits no DeveloperDocumentation and add-method scaffolds no XML doc header (add-table-method/add-display-method do).
suggested_fix_area: src/tools/modify (add-table-method EDT resolution: query the bridge/IMetadataProvider before falling back to the index, and FAIL instead of emitting the field name as a type); add-display-method template (emit [SysClientCacheDataMethodAttribute(true)] as documented, or fix the tool description); bridge ReplaceCode newline normalization; table create + add-method BP defaults (DeveloperDocumentation, XML doc header).
